debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

failed_attempts:
classical

    constructor
    · exact (interAlong f).injective h1
    · exact (interAlong g).injective h2

let T (i j : Fin n) (h : i ≠ j) := interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), clap (b i) (T i j hij) ≠ clap (b j) (T j i hij.symm) := by
    sorry
  use fun i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff]
    intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
    let Tfg := T f g hfg
    let Tgf := T g f hfg.symm
    have hclap1 : t = clap (b f) Tfg := by
      rw [clap_def] at h1
      by_cases hbf : b f <;> simp [hbf] at h1 <;>
      rw [hbf, clap_def]; simp; (try rw [if_pos hbf]); (try rw [if_neg hbf]);
      all_goals {
        have := interAlong f Tfg
        rw [← h1] at this
        exact interAlong f.1.Injective this
      }
    have hclap2 : t = clap (b g) Tgf := by
      rw [clap_def] at h2
      by_cases hbg : b g <;> simp [hbg] at h2 <;>
      rw [hbg, clap_def]; simp; (try rw [if_pos hbg]); (try rw [if_neg hbg]);
      all_goals {
        have := interAlong g Tgf
        rw [← h2] at this
        exact interAlong g.1.Injective this
      }
    rw [hclap1, hclap2] at hb
    exact hb f g hfg rfl
sorry

let b (i : Fin n) : Bool := (points i).1.1 > (points i).2.1 ∨ ((points i).1.1 = (points i).2.1 ∧ (points i).1.2 > (points i).2.2)
  use fun i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t h_eq
    have h_line := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f (clap (b f) t)) (interAlong g (clap (b g) t))).mp h_eq
    have h_idx_f : clap (b f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := interAlong f (clap (b f) t) |>.2 h_line.1
    have h_idx_g : clap (b g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := interAlong g (clap (b g) t) |>.2 h_line.2
    set Pf := interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩
    set Pg := interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩
    rw [clap_def] at h_idx_f h_idx_g
    split_ifs at h_idx_f h_idx_g with bf bg
    · rw [Fin.rev_eq_iff] at h_idx_f h_idx_g
      subst h_idx_f h_idx_g
      have : Pf = Pg := by rfl
      sorry
    · rw [Fin.rev_eq_iff] at h_idx_f
      subst h_idx_f h_idx_g
      have : (Pg : ℕ) + (Pf : ℕ) = n - 2 := sorry
      sorry
    · rw [Fin.rev_eq_iff] at h_idx_g
      subst h_idx_f h_idx_g
      have : (Pf : ℕ) + (Pg : ℕ) = n - 2 := sorry
      sorry
    · subst h_idx_f h_idx_g
      have : Pf = Pg := sorry
      sorry

have ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ f g (hfg : f ≠ g), ∀ t, clap (b f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ → clap (b g) t ≠ interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := sorry
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, b i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t h => ?_⟩⟩
  have := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _).mp h
  exact hb f g hfg t (interAlong f).injective this.1 (interAlong g).injective this.2

cases b <;> simp [clap_def, Fin.rev_rev]
rw [← hf, ← hg, h_inv, h_inv]

let p (i j : Fin n) (h : i ≠ j) : ℕ := (interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩).val
  have h_odd_n : (n - 1) % 2 = 0 := by
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hn; simp [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_assoc]
  have : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (h : i ≠ j),
      if b i = b j then p i j h ≠ p j i h.symm
      else p i j h + p j i h.symm ≠ n - 2 := by
    obtain ⟨σ, _hσ⟩ : ∃ σ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n), ∀ i j, i < j →
        (p (σ i) (σ j) (σ.injective.ne (ne_of_lt i_lt_j)) +
         p (σ j) (σ i) (σ.injective.ne (ne_of_lt i_lt_j).symm)) % 2 = (j.val - i.val - 1) % 2 := sorry
    refine ⟨fun i => (σ.symm i).val % 2 = 0, fun i j h => ?_⟩
    let i' := σ.symm i; let j' := σ.symm j
    have hi'j' : i' ≠ j' := σ.symm.injective.ne h
    wlog h_lt : i' < j' generalizing i j
    · specialize this j i h.symm j' i' hi'j'.symm (hi'j'.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h_lt)
      if h_eq : ((j'.val % 2 = 0) = (i'.val % 2 = 0)) then
        simp [h_eq] at this ⊢; exact ne_comm.mp this
      else simp [h_eq] at this ⊢; rw [add_comm]; exact this
    specialize hσ i' j' h_lt; have h_sum := hσ
    if h_eq : (i'.val % 2 = 0) = (j'.val % 2 = 0) then
      simp [h_eq]; intro h_coll; apply_fun (· % 2) at h_coll
      have : (j'.val - i'.val) % 2 = 0 := by
        obtain ⟨k, m, rfl, rfl⟩ := (Nat.even_iff.mpr h_eq).symm.casesOn
          (by obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.even_iff.mp (Nat.even_iff.mpr h_eq);
              obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Nat.even_iff.mp (Nat.even_iff.mpr (by rwa [h_eq]));
              exact ⟨k, m, rfl, rfl⟩)
          (by obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.odd_iff.mp (Nat.even_iff.mpr h_eq).not.not;
              obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Nat.odd_iff.mp (Nat.even_iff.mpr (by rwa [h_eq])).not.not;
              exact ⟨k, m, rfl, rfl⟩)
        simp [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]
      rw [h_coll, ← two_mul, Nat.mul_mod_right] at h_sum
      simp [this] at h_sum
    else
      simp [h_eq]; intro h_coll; apply_fun (· % 2) at h_coll
      have : (j'.val - i'.val) % 2 = 1 := by
        revert h_eq; cases i'.val % 2 <;> cases j'.val % 2 <;> simp
      rw [h_coll, h_odd_n] at h_sum; simp [this] at h_sum
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := this
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, b i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t => ?_⟩⟩
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff]; push_neg; intro h_eq; obtain ⟨hf, hg⟩ := h_eq
  have hf_val : clap (b f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by
    apply interAlong f; rw [hf]
  have hg_val : clap (b g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by
    apply interAlong g; rw [hg]
  specialize hb f g hfg; rw [clap_def] at hf_val hg_val
  split_ifs at hb with h_eq_b
  · rw [h_eq_b] at hf_val hg_val; split_ifs at hf_val hg_val
    · apply_fun Fin.val at hf_val hg_val; rw [hf_val] at hg_val; exact hb hg_val
    · rw [hf_val] at hg_val; exact hb hg_val
  · split_ifs at hf_val hg_val
    · apply_fun Fin.val at hf_val hg_val; rw [Fin.val_rev] at hf_val; exact hb (by rw [← hf_val, hg_val])
    · apply_fun Fin.val at hf_val hg_val; rw [Fin.val_rev] at hg_val; exact hb (by rw [← hg_val, hf_val])

have ⟨s, hs⟩ : ∃ s : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j) (t : Fin (n - 1)),
      lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2 (interAlong i (clap (s i) t)).1 ≠
      lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2 (interAlong j (clap (s j) t)).1 := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨λ i => (i, s i), λ f g hfg => ⟨hfg, hs f g hfg⟩⟩

let t_meet (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (bi bj : Bool) : Prop :=
    (clap bi (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩)) = (clap bj (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩))
  let M (b : Fin n → Bool) := {p : {p : Fin n × Fin n // p.1 < p.2} | t_meet p.1.1 p.1.2 (ne_of_lt p.2) (b p.1.1) (b p.1.2)}
  have h_parity : ∀ b, (M b).ncard % 2 = (n * (n - 1) / 2 / 2) % 2 := sorry
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b, (M b).ncard = 0 := sorry
  use fun f => (f, b f)
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, fun t h => ?_⟩
  have hne : f ≠ g := hfg
  let i := f; let j := g
  have hij : i ≠ j := hne
  have heq := (lineMap_eq_iff i j hij (interAlong i (clap (b i) t)) (interAlong j (clap (b j) t))).1 h
  have ht1 : interAlong i (clap (b i) t) = interAlong i (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) := heq.1
  have ht2 : interAlong j (clap (b j) t) = interAlong j (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := heq.2
  have h1 : clap (b i) t = interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ := (interAlong i).injective ht1
  have h2 : clap (b j) t = interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ := (interAlong j).injective ht2
  have h_clap_inv (b' : Bool) : (clap b').bijective := by rw [clap_def]; split <;> [exact Fin.rev_bijective; exact Function.bijective_id]
  have t_eq : t = (h_clap_inv (b i)).1 (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) := (h_clap_inv (b i)).left_inverse h1
  have t_eq' : t = (h_clap_inv (b j)).1 (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := (h_clap_inv (b j)).left_inverse h2
  have h_meet : (h_clap_inv (b i)).1 (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) = (h_clap_inv (b j)).1 (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := by rw [← t_eq, t_eq']
  have h_final : (M b).ncard > 0 := sorry
  exact absurd hb (ne_of_gt h_final)

let sl i := ((points i).2.2 - (points i).1.2) / ((points i).2.1 - (points i).1.1)
  obtain ⟨σ, hσ⟩ := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).exists_bijection_to_Fin_of_card_eq (by simp)
  use fun f => (σ f, f.1 % 2 == 1)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact σ.injective.ne hfg
  · intro t heq
    let i := σ f; let j := σ g
    have hij : i ≠ j := σ.injective.ne hfg
    let ri := interAlong i (clap (f.1 % 2 == 1) t)
    let rj := interAlong j (clap (g.1 % 2 == 1) t)
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff i j hij ri rj] at heq
    have ti := congr_arg (interBtw i) (interAlong i.injective (Prod.ext_iff.1 heq.1).1)
    have tj := congr_arg (interBtw j) (interAlong j.injective (Prod.ext_iff.1 heq.1).2)
    simp only [Equiv.apply_symm_apply] at ti tj
    have parity_check : (f.1 % 2 + g.1 % 2 + (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).1 + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).1) % 2 = 1 := by sorry
    cases f.1 % 2 <;> cases g.1 % 2 <;> simp [clap_def] at * <;> omega

have ⟨s, hs⟩ : ∃ s : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
      clap (s i) (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) ≠ clap (s j) (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := by
    let c (R : Set ℝ²) : Fin 2 := sorry -- 2-coloring of the regions exists
    have exists_s : ∃ s : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i, (if s i then 1 - (interAlong i 0).1.1 else (interAlong i 0).1.1) > 0 := sorry -- Choice of orientation based on n being odd
    sorry
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, s i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t h_meet => ?_⟩⟩
  let i := (f), j := (g)
  have hij : i ≠ j := hfg
  have h_eq := (lineMap_eq_iff i j hij (interAlong i (clap (s i) t)) (interAlong j (clap (s j) t))).mp h_meet
  exact hs i j hij (h_eq.1.symm ▸ h_eq.2.symm ▸ rfl)

obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ : ∃ d : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
    (if d i = d j then (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).val ≠ (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).val
    else (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).val + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).val ≠ n - 2) := sorry
  use (fun i => (i, d i))
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, fun t => ?_⟩
  specialize hd f g hfg
  rw [clap_def, clap_def, lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg]
  push_neg
  intro h1 h2
  cases hdf : d f <;> cases hdg : d g
  · rw [hdf, hdg, if_pos rfl] at hd
    simp only [hdf, hdg, ↓reduceIte, id_eq] at h1 h2
    exact hd (congr_arg (fun x => (x : Fin (n - 1)).val) h1.symm.trans h2)
  · rw [hdf, hdg, if_neg Bool.ff_ne_tt] at hd
    simp only [hdf, hdg, ↓reduceIte, id_eq, Fin.rev_val] at h1 h2
    apply hd
    rw [← Fin.val_inj.mpr h1, ← Fin.val_inj.mpr h2, Fin.rev_val]
    omega
  · rw [hdf, hdg, if_neg Bool.tt_ne_ff] at hd
    simp only [hdf, hdg, ↓reduceIte, id_eq, Fin.rev_val] at h1 h2
    apply hd
    rw [← Fin.val_inj.mpr h1, ← Fin.val_inj.mpr h2, Fin.rev_val]
    omega
  · rw [hdf, hdg, if_pos rfl] at hd
    simp only [hdf, hdg, ↓reduceIte, Fin.rev_val] at h1 h2
    apply hd
    have : (clap true t).val = (clap true t).val := rfl
    rw [← h1, ← h2] at this
    exact Fin.val_inj.mp this

let p (i j : Fin n) (h : i ≠ j) := interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩
  have hp : ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), (p i j hij : ℕ) + (p j i hij.symm : ℕ) ≤ 2 * (n - 2) := by
    intros; omega
  let F_0 : Fin n → Fin n × Bool := fun i => (i, false)
  let collides (F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool) := ∃ f g, f ≠ g ∧ ∃ t,
    lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2 (interAlong (F f).1 (clap (F f).2 t)).1 =
    lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2 (interAlong (F g).1 (clap (F g).2 t)).1
  let prob_space := Fin n → Bool
  have : Nonempty (Fin n → Fin n × Bool) := ⟨fun i => (i, false)⟩
  obtain ⟨F, h_no_coll⟩ : ∃ F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool, (∀ f g, f ≠ g → (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1) ∧ ¬collides F := by
    classical
    let all_F := { F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool | ∀ f g, f ≠ g → (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 }
    have h_fin : all_F.Finite := Set.Finite.of_fintype all_F
    let count_coll (F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool) :=
      univ.filter (fun (pair : Fin n × Fin n) => pair.1 < pair.2 ∧ ∃ t,
        lineMap (points (F pair.1).1).1 (points (F pair.1).1).2 (interAlong (F pair.1).1 (clap (F pair.1).2 t)).1 =
        lineMap (points (F pair.2).1).1 (points (F pair.2).1).2 (interAlong (F pair.2).1 (clap (F pair.2).2 t)).1).card
    let best_F := h_fin.toFinset.min' (by
      use fun i => (i, false)
      simp [all_F])
    obtain ⟨F, hF_in, hF_min⟩ := h_fin.toFinset.exists_mem_min' (by use fun i => (i, false); simp [all_F])
    use F, (by simpa using hF_in)
    intro h_coll
    obtain ⟨f, g, hfg, t, h_eq⟩ := h_coll
    let i := (F f).1; let j := (F g).1
    let hij : i ≠ j := (simpa using hF_in) f g hfg
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff i j hij] at h_eq
    obtain ⟨h_eq_i, h_eq_j⟩ := h_eq
    rw [clap_def, clap_def] at h_eq_i h_eq_j
    let b_i := (F f).2; let b_j := (F g).2
    let val_i := if b_i then Fin.rev (p i j hij) else (p i j hij)
    let val_j := if b_j then Fin.rev (p j i hij.symm) else (p j i hij.symm)
    have : (n - 2 : ℤ) ≡ 1 [ZMOD 2] := by
      rcases hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩
      simp [Int.two_mul_add_one_zmod_two]
    sorry
  use F
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨h_no_coll.1 f g hfg, ?_⟩
  intro t h_eq; apply h_no_coll.2
  use f, g, hfg, t

obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ : ∃ d : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
      clap (d i) (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) ≠ clap (d j) (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨λ i ↦ (i, d i), λ f g hfg ↦ ⟨hfg, λ t h_eq ↦
    let h := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _).1 h_eq
    have hf : t = clap (d f) (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩) := by
      have := (interAlong f).injective (Subtype.ext h.1); cases d f <;> simp [clap_def, Fin.rev_rev, ← this]
    have hg : t = clap (d g) (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩) := by
      have := (interAlong g).injective (Subtype.ext h.2); cases d g <;> simp [clap_def, Fin.rev_rev, ← this]
    hd f g hfg (hf.trans hg.symm)⟩⟩

let f_orient (i : Fin n) : Bool := sorry
  use fun i => (i, f_orient i)
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨by simp [hfg], fun t h_meet => ?_⟩
  have h_eq := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg (interAlong f (clap (f_orient f) t)) (interAlong g (clap (f_orient g) t))).mp h_meet
  have h_tf : clap (f_orient f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by apply interAlong f; exact h_eq.1
  have h_tg : clap (f_orient g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by apply interAlong g; exact h_eq.2
  sorry

obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
      clap (b i) (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) ≠ clap (b j) (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := by
    sorry
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, b i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t h_eq => ?_⟩⟩
  have h_eq' := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _).mp h_eq
  have hf : clap (b f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := (interAlong f).injective h_eq'.1
  have hg : clap (b g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := (interAlong g).injective h_eq'.2
  apply hb f g hfg
  rw [← hf, ← hg]
  cases b f <;> cases b g <;> simp [clap_def]

have ⟨f, hf⟩ := @Imo2016P6.can_fulfill n hn.pos (interBtw)
  exact ⟨fun i => (i, f i), fun i j hij => ⟨hij, fun t => hf i j hij t⟩⟩

let slope (i : Fin n) : ℝ :=
    let v := (points i).2 - (points i).1
    if v 0 = 0 then 10^10 else v 1 / v 0
  obtain ⟨σ, hσ⟩ := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).exists_bij_ordered_map slope
  let b (i : Fin n) : Bool := (σ.symm i).val % 2 == 1
  use (fun i => (i, b i))
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, fun t => ?_⟩
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff]
  intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
  let i := f; let j := g
  let k_ij := interBtw i ⟨j, hfg⟩
  let k_ji := interBtw j ⟨i, hfg.symm⟩
  rw [clap_def] at h1 h2
  have h_collision : clap (b i) t = k_ij ∧ clap (b j) t = k_ji := by
    constructor
    · exact interAlong.injective (Subtype.ext h1)
    · exact interAlong.injective (Subtype.ext h2)
  sorry

let c (i j : Fin n) (h : i ≠ j) : ℕ := (interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩).1 + (interBtw j ⟨i, h.symm⟩).1
  have h_sum (i j k : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (hjk : j ≠ k) (hki : k ≠ i) :
    (c i j hij + c j k hjk + c k i hki) % 2 = 0 := sorry
  have : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (h : i ≠ j), (b i = b j) ↔ (c i j h % 2 = 0) := sorry
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := this
  use λ i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg; simp; constructor; · exact hfg
  intro t heq
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg] at heq; cases heq with | intro h1 h2 =>
  have h1' := congr_arg (λ x => x.1) (interAlong.injective h1)
  have h2' := congr_arg (λ x => x.1) (interAlong.injective h2)
  rw [clap_def, clap_def] at h1' h2'
  let ti := if b f then (n - 2 - t.1) else t.1
  let tj := if b g then (n - 2 - t.1) else t.1
  have : ti = (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).1 := by dsimp [ti]; split_ifs <;> [rw [Fin.rev_apply] at h1'; exact h1'; exact h1']
  have : tj = (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).1 := by dsimp [tj]; split_ifs <;> [rw [Fin.rev_apply] at h2'; exact h2'; exact h2']
  have h_odd : (ti + tj) % 2 = (interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩).1 + (interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩).1 := by rw [←this, ←this]
  have h_parity : (ti + tj) % 2 = if b f = b g then 0 else 1 := by
    dsimp [ti, tj]; split_ifs with hf hg hfg' <;> simp [hn.back]
    · exact Nat.two_mul_mod_two t.1
    · have : (n - 2 - t.1 + t.1) = n - 2 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (by omega)
      rw [this]; exact Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by omega)
    · have : (t.1 + (n - 2 - t.1)) = n - 2 := Nat.add_sub_cancel' (by omega)
      rw [this]; exact Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by omega)
    · exact Nat.two_mul_mod_two (n - 2 - t.1)
  rw [h_parity] at h_odd; rw [hb] at h_odd; cases b f == b g <;> simp at h_odd

let b (i : Fin n) : Bool := (i.val % 2 == 0)
  exists fun i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t
    replace clap_def := clap_def (b f)
    replace hfg := hfg
    intro h_meet
    let i := f
    let j := g
    have hij : i ≠ j := hfg
    have h_eq := lineMap_eq_iff i j hij (interAlong i (clap (b i) t)) (interAlong j (clap (b j) t))
    rw [h_meet] at h_eq
    have ⟨hi, hj⟩ := (h_eq.mp rfl)
    have hi_inv := interAlong i.injective hi
    have hj_inv := interAlong j.injective hj
    let Ri := interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩
    let Rj := interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩
    have h_t_i : clap (b i) t = Ri := hi_inv
    have h_t_j : clap (b j) t = Rj := hj_inv
    have h_parity : ∀ (b : Bool) (x : Fin (n - 1)), (clap b x).val % 2 = if b then (n - 2 - x.val) % 2 else x.val % 2 := by
      intro b x; rw [clap_def]; split <;> simp [Fin.rev]
    have h_n_odd : (n - 2) % 2 = 1 := by
      obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hn
      simp [Nat.add_sub_assoc hn.pos]
    have h_parity_i : (clap (b i) t).val % 2 = (b i ^ t.val) % 2 := sorry
    have h_parity_j : (clap (b j) t).val % 2 = (b j ^ t.val) % 2 := sorry
    sorry

let angle (i : Fin n) : ℝ := Real.angle (points i).2 ((points i).2 - (points i).1)
  let σ := (Fin.univ : Finset (Fin n)).sort (λ i j => angle i < angle j)
  have hσ : σ.length = n := by simp
  let rank (i : Fin n) : Fin n := ⟨(σ.indexOf i), by rw [hσ]; exact σ.indexOf_lt_length (Finset.mem_univ i)⟩
  let F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool := λ f => (f, (rank f).val % 2 == 1)
  use F
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg]
    intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
    have h_clap_f := congr_arg (clap (F f).2) t
    have h_clap_g := congr_arg (clap (F g).2) t
    let b_f := (F f).2
    let b_g := (F g).2
    let a_fg := interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩
    let a_gf := interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩
    have h_meet : (clap b_f t = a_fg) ∧ (clap b_g t = a_gf) := by
      constructor
      · exact (interAlong f).injective (by rw [h1]; rfl)
      · exact (interAlong g).injective (by rw [h2]; rfl)
    rw [clap_def] at h_meet
    cases b_f <;> cases b_g
    · simp only [id_eq, ite_false] at h_meet
      have : a_fg = a_gf := by rw [← h_meet.1, h_meet.2]
      have : (rank f).val % 2 = (rank g).val % 2 := by simp [F] at *; contradiction
      sorry
    · simp only [id_eq, ite_false, ite_true] at h_meet
      have : a_fg + a_gf = n - 2 := sorry
      sorry
    · simp only [id_eq, ite_false, ite_true] at h_meet
      have : a_fg + a_gf = n - 2 := sorry
      sorry
    · simp only [id_eq, ite_true] at h_meet
      have : a_fg = a_gf := sorry
      sorry

let b (i : Fin n) : Bool := (interBtw i).toFun ⟨(Fin.rev i), (by
    intro h; have := hn.1; have := h.symm
    cases n with
    | zero => contradiction
    | succ n =>
      have h1 : (Fin.rev i).val = n - i.val := rfl
      have h2 : i.val = n - i.val := by rwa [←h1, ←Fin.ext_iff]
      have : 2 * i.val = n := by
        rw [two_mul, ←h2, Nat.add_sub_cancel']
        exact i.is_lt
      rw [←this] at hn
      cases hn with | mk k hk =>
        rw [hk] at this
        exact Nat.not_even_odd (Even.intro _ rfl) (Odd.intro _ rfl))⟩.val % 2 == 0
  use fun i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, fun t h_eq => ?_⟩
  set p1 := (F f).1; set p2 := (F g).1
  set b1 := (F f).2; set b2 := (F g).2
  let r1 := interAlong p1 (clap b1 t)
  let r2 := interAlong p2 (clap b2 t)
  have h_eq' := (lineMap_eq_iff p1 p2 hfg r1 r2).mp h_eq
  have ht1 : clap b1 t = interBtw p1 ⟨p2, hfg⟩ := by
    have h_r1 := h_eq'.1; injection h_r1 with h_r1'
    exact (interAlong p1).injective h_r1'
  have ht2 : clap b2 t = interBtw p2 ⟨p1, hfg.symm⟩ := by
    have h_r2 := h_eq'.2; injection h_r2 with h_r2'
    exact (interAlong p2).injective h_r2'
  rw [clap_def] at ht1 ht2
  sorry

let m (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) : Fin 2 :=
    if interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ = interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ then 1 else 0
  have h_tri : ∀ i j k (hij : i ≠ j) (hjk : j ≠ k) (hki : k ≠ i),
      m i j hij + m j k hjk + m k i hki = 0 := by
    intro i j k hij hjk hki
    let t_ij := (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).1
    let t_ji := (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).1
    let t_jk := (interBtw j ⟨k, hjk⟩).1
    let t_kj := (interBtw k ⟨j, hjk.symm⟩).1
    let t_ki := (interBtw k ⟨i, hki⟩).1
    let t_ik := (interBtw i ⟨k, hki.symm⟩).1
    have : (t_ij + t_ji + t_jk + t_kj + t_ki + t_ik) % 2 = 0 := by
      rw [add_assoc, add_comm t_ji, ← add_assoc, ← add_assoc]
      repeat rw [← add_assoc]
      sorry
    sorry
  have : ∃ b : Fin n → Fin 2, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), b i + b j = m i j hij := by
    sorry
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := this
  let F (f : Fin n) : Fin n × Bool := (f, b f = 1)
  use F
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff]
    intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
    let i := f
    let j := g
    have hij : i ≠ j := hfg
    rw [clap_def, clap_def] at h1 h2
    simp only at h1 h2
    by_cases hb1 : b i = 1 <;> by_cases hb2 : b j = 1
    · simp [hb1, hb2] at h1 h2
      have : interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ = interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ := by
        rw [← h1, ← h2, Fin.rev_inj]
      have : b i + b j = 1 := by
        rw [hb1, hb2]
        exact rfl
      have : m i j hij = 1 := by
        simp [m, this]
      rw [hb, this] at hb1
      sorry
    · sorry
    · sorry
    · sorry

let w : Fin n → Fin n → ℕ := fun i j => if h : i = j then 0 else
    ((interBtw i ⟨j, h⟩).val + (interBtw j ⟨i, h.symm⟩).val + 1) % 2
  have hw : ∀ i j k, (w i j + w j k + w k i) % 2 = 0 := by
    intro i j k
    by_cases hij : i = j; · simp [hij, w]
    by_cases hjk : j = k; · simp [hjk, w]
    by_cases hki : k = i; · simp [hki, w]
    simp only [w, hij, hjk, hki, dite_false]
    let f x y (h : x ≠ y) := (interBtw x ⟨y, h⟩).val
    have hsum : (f i j hij + f i k hki + f j i hij.symm + f j k hjk + f k i hki.symm + f k j hjk.symm) % 2 = 1 := sorry
    rw [← Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_right_comm, ← Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_right_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
    rw [Nat.add_assoc _ 1 1, Nat.add_assoc _ 2 1, ← Nat.add_assoc]
    simp [hsum]
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → ℕ, ∀ i j, (b i + b j) % 2 = w i j := by
    use fun i => (List.range n).take i.val |>.map (fun j => w (⟨j, sorry⟩ : Fin n) ⟨j+1, sorry⟩) |>.sum
    sorry
  use fun f => (f, (b f % 2 = 1))
  intro f g hfg
  refine ⟨hfg, fun t => ?_⟩
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff]
  intro h; rcases h with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  let i := f; let j := g
  have hne : i ≠ j := hfg
  have ht1 := interAlong.injective h1; have ht2 := interAlong.injective h2
  rw [clap_def, clap_def] at ht1 ht2
  have : (b i + b j) % 2 = ((interBtw i ⟨j, hne⟩).val + (interBtw j ⟨i, hne.symm⟩).val + 1) % 2 := by
    rw [hb i j, w, dite_false]
  by_cases bi : (b i % 2 = 1) <;> by_cases bj : (b j % 2 = 1) <;>
  simp [bi, bj] at bi bj ht1 ht2 <;>
  simp [bi, bj] at this
  · rw [ht1, ht2] at this; simp [Fin.rev] at this; sorry
  · rw [ht1, ht2] at this; simp [Fin.rev] at this; sorry
  · rw [ht1, ht2] at this; simp [Fin.rev] at this; sorry
  · rw [ht1, ht2] at this; simp [Fin.rev] at this; sorry

let slope (i : Fin n) : ℝ :=
    let v := (points i).2 - (points i).1
    if v 0 = 0 then 1e18 else v 1 / v 0
  let is_forward (i : Fin n) : Bool :=
    let v := (points i).2 - (points i).1
    v 0 > 0 ∨ (v 0 = 0 ∧ v 1 > 0)
  obtain ⟨σ, hσ⟩ := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).exists_bijection_ordered_by slope
  let e (i : Fin n) : Bool := (σ.invFun i).val % 2 = 1
  let F (i : Fin n) : Fin n × Bool := (i, e i != is_forward i)
  use F; intro f g hfg; refine ⟨hfg, fun t h_eq ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff] at h_eq; obtain ⟨h_f, h_g⟩ := h_eq
  let i := f; let j := g; let di := (F i).2; let dj := (F j).2
  let ti := clap di t; let tj := clap dj t
  let s i j (hij : i ≠ j) : ℕ := (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).val
  have h_ti : s i j hfg = (clap di t).val := congr_arg Fin.val (EmbeddingLike.apply_eq_iff_eq (interAlong i) |>.mp h_f.symm)
  have h_tj : s j i hfg.symm = (clap dj t).val := congr_arg Fin.val (EmbeddingLike.apply_eq_iff_eq (interAlong j) |>.mp h_g.symm)
  let si := (σ.invFun i).val; let sj := (σ.invFun j).val
  have h_parity : (s i j hfg + s j i hfg.symm) % 2 = (if si < sj then sj - si - 1 else si - sj - 1) % 2 := sorry
  have h_meet : (if di = dj then (s i j hfg + s j i hfg.symm) % 2 = (2 * t.val) % 2 else (s i j hfg + s j i hfg.symm) % 2 = (n - 2) % 2) := sorry
  exact (by
    cases h : di == dj
    · have : (s i j hfg + s j i hfg.symm) % 2 = (n - 2) % 2 := sorry
      simp [hn.p6_helper] at this -- hypothetical lemma for odd n
    · have : (s i j hfg + s j i hfg.symm) % 2 = 0 := sorry
      simp at this) sorry

let total_collisions (b : Fin n → Bool) := {p : {p : Fin n × Fin n // p.1 < p.2} |
    let i := p.1.1; let j := p.1.2;
    let hij := p.2.ne; let hij' := p.2.ne.symm;
    ∃ t, clap (b i) t = interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ ∧ clap (b j) t = interBtw j ⟨i, hij'⟩}.toFinset.card
  have h_parity (b b' : Fin n → Bool) (i : Fin n) (h : ∀ j, j ≠ i → b j = b' j) :
      total_collisions b ≡ total_collisions b' [MOD 2] := by
    let diff := {j | j ≠ i ∧ ((∃ t, clap (b i) t = interBtw i ⟨j, ⋯⟩ ∧ clap (b j) t = interBtw j ⟨i, ⋯⟩) ≠
                               (∃ t, clap (b' i) t = interBtw i ⟨j, ⋯⟩ ∧ clap (b' j) t = interBtw j ⟨i, ⋯⟩))}
    have : total_collisions b' = total_collisions b - (total_collisions b - total_collisions b') := sorry
    sorry
  have h_all_parity (b b' : Fin n → Bool) : total_collisions b ≡ total_collisions b' [MOD 2] := sorry
  have h_exists_even : ∃ b, total_collisions b % 2 = 0 := sorry
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := h_exists_even
  sorry

classical
  let A (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) : Fin 2 :=
    (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).1 + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).1 + 1
  let Solvable (n : ℕ) := ∀ (A : (i j : Fin n) → (i ≠ j) → Fin 2),
    (∀ i j k (hij : i ≠ j) (hjk : j ≠ k) (hki : k ≠ i),
      A i j hij + A j k hjk + A k i hki = 0) →
    ∃ d : Fin n → Fin 2, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), d i + d j = A i j hij
  have h_odd : ∃ d : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
    (if d i then Fin.rev (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) else interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩) ≠
    (if d j then Fin.rev (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) else interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩) := by sorry
  obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := h_odd
  exact ⟨fun i => (i, d i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t => by
    intro h
    have := (lineMap_eq_iff (F := id) f g hfg
      (interAlong f (clap (d f) t)) (interAlong g (clap (d g) t))).mp h
    rw [clap_def, clap_def] at this
    have h1 := this.1
    have h2 := this.2
    simp only [id_eq, EmbeddingLike.apply_eq_iff_eq] at h1 h2
    have hf : clap (d f) t = interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩ := by
      rw [clap_def]; split_ifs <;> [exact h1; exact h1]
    have hg : clap (d g) t = interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩ := by
      rw [clap_def]; split_ifs <;> [exact h2; exact h2]
    let tf := interBtw f ⟨g, hfg⟩
    let tg := interBtw g ⟨f, hfg.symm⟩
    have hf' : t = if d f then Fin.rev tf else tf := by
      rw [clap_def] at hf; split_ifs at hf <;> [exact Fin.rev_inj.mp hf; exact hf]
    have hg' : t = if d g then Fin.rev tg else tg := by
      rw [clap_def] at hg; split_ifs at hg <;> [exact Fin.rev_inj.mp hg; exact hg]
    exact hd f g hfg (by rw [← hf', ← hg'])⟩⟩

let slope (i : Fin n) : ℝ :=
    let p1 := (points i).1
    let p2 := (points i).2
    (p2 1 - p1 1) / (p2 0 - p1 0)
  obtain ⟨σ, _⟩ := Finite.exists_equiv_and_mono slope
  let b (i : Fin n) : Bool := (σ i).val % 2 == 0
  use λ f => (f, b f)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor
  · exact hfg
  · intro t h_eq
    rw [lineMap_eq_iff] at h_eq
    replace h_eq := h_eq.1
    rw [RelEmbedding.apply_eq_iff_eq] at h_eq
    let i := f; let j := g
    let xi_j := interBtw i ⟨j, hfg⟩
    let xj_i := interBtw j ⟨i, hfg.symm⟩
    have h_meet : clap (b i) t = xi_j ∧ clap (b j) t = xj_i := by
      rw [lineMap_eq_iff] at h_eq
      exact sorry
    sorry

obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j),
      if b i = b j then interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ ≠ interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩
      else (interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩).val + (interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩).val ≠ n - 2 := sorry
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, b i), fun f g hfg => ⟨hfg, fun t h => ?_⟩⟩
  have h' := (lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg _ _).mp h
  specialize hb f g hfg
  simp [clap_def] at h'
  rcases h' with ⟨h1, h2⟩
  cases hf : b f <;> cases hg : b g <;> simp [hf, hg] at h1 h2
  · exact hb (h1.symm.trans h2)
  · apply hb; rw [← h1, h2, Fin.val_rev]; omega
  · apply hb; rw [h1, ← h2, Fin.val_rev]; omega
  · exact hb (h1.symm.trans h2)

let x i j hij := interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩
  let rel i j hij := (x i j hij = x j i hij.symm)
  have h_odd (i j hij) : x i j hij = x j i hij.symm ↔ x i j hij + x j i hij.symm ≠ (n - 1) - 1 := by
    have : (n - 1) - 1 = n - 2 := rfl
    have : Odd (n - 2) := hn.sub_even (by norm_num)
    have : x i j hij + x j i hij.symm ≡ n - 2 [MOD 2] := sorry
    aesop
  let G := { b : Fin n → Bool // ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), (b i = b j) ↔ x i j hij ≠ x j i hij.symm }
  have ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), (b i = b j) ↔ x i j hij ≠ x j i hij.symm := sorry
  refine ⟨fun i => (i, b i), fun i j hij => ⟨hij, fun t h_eq => ?_⟩⟩
  rw [lineMap_eq_iff i j hij] at h_eq
  have h_clap := h_eq.1
  rw [clap_def, clap_def] at h_clap
  split_ifs at h_clap with bi bj bj
  · exact (hb i j hij).mp (by rfl) (Fin.rev.injective h_clap)
  · have h_sum : x i j hij + x j i hij.symm = n - 2 := by
      rw [← h_clap, ← h_eq.2, clap_def, if_pos bj]
      simp [Fin.rev, ← Fin.val_inj, Nat.sub_sub_self (by omega)]
    exact (hb i j hij).not.mp (by aesop) (h_odd i j hij |>.mpr (by omega))
  · have h_sum : x i j hij + x j i hij.symm = n - 2 := by
      rw [← h_eq.2, ← h_clap, clap_def, if_neg bj]
      simp [Fin.rev, ← Fin.val_inj, Nat.sub_sub_self (by omega)]
    exact (hb i j hij).not.mp (by aesop) (h_odd i j hij |>.mpr (by omega))
  · exact (hb i j hij).mp (by rfl) h_clap

obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ : ∃ b : Fin n → Bool, ∀ i j (hij : i ≠ j), ∀ t : Fin (n - 1),
      clap (b i) t ≠ interBtw i ⟨j, hij⟩ ∨ clap (b j) t ≠ interBtw j ⟨i, hij.symm⟩ := sorry
  use fun i => (i, b i)
  intro f g hfg
  constructor; · exact hfg
  intro t
  simp [lineMap_eq_iff f g hfg, (interAlong _).injective.eq_iff, hb f g hfg t]
